name: RPlog_Imperial_Assault_on_Caspar
title: The Imperial Assault on Caspar
summary: In a massive battle for Caspar, General Veers leads the Imperial Army, backed by Commodore Ken Wolf and Warlord-era forces, across the blown bridges of the Sessapan River against the entrenched Casparian Defense Union Marines. Imperial walkers, stormtrooper legions, TIE fighters, and speeder bikes grind forward in overwhelming numbers, leveling the city block by block while CDU defenders including Commander Calder, Webb's recon platoon, the disguised street-musician Shenner, Athena, Elly, Rodo, Whitney, Stalh, and the Harpoon pilots of Royal Squadron mount a fierce but costly fighting withdrawal toward Trinumvira base. The bluffs of Trinumvira turn the Imperial advance into a killing field of anti-armor mines, Wraith gunships, and Hammerhead ambushes, but the Empire's relentless numbers press on regardless of losses. The battle reaches a grim climax when Webb snipes and wounds General Veers, prompting Veers to order the base annihilated and the troopers to gun down CDU positions in retaliation; with Veers injured, the Imperials withdraw just far enough to keep the battered Marines cornered, to be continued.
